meaning: n.雄鹿角,石松,一种大珊瑚
examples: Objective: to evaluate the surgical treatment of huge staghorn stone.
Xanthogranulomatous pyelonephritis and staghorn calculus are rare in children.
Objective To evaluate the effects of intrasinusal pyelolithotomy for the removal staghorn stone.
Nedimyer developed a method of growing elkhorn and staghorn coral in underwater nurseries and transplanting it to the wild.
The Coral Sea teems with marine life: giant clams, sea anemones, schools of rainbow-coloured fish, painted tube and staghorn coral inhabit the underwater garden.
